# HTML.CustomDoctype.txt 知识梳理

> 来源: `HTML.CustomDoctype.txt` | 字数: 233

## 内容全文

HTML.CustomDoctype

TYPE: string/null

VERSION: 2.0.1

DEFAULT: NULL

--DESCRIPTION--

A custom doctype for power-users who defined their own document

type. This directive only applies when %HTML.Doctype is blank.

--# vim: et sw=4 sts=4
